title: How AI Assistants are Moving the Security Goalposts
headline: How AI Assistants are Moving the Security Goalposts
deck: AI-based assistants or "agents" -- autonomous programs that have access to the user's computer, files, online services and can automate virtually any task -- are growing in popularity with developers and IT workers. But
